user.description: Enter your Kakao Developers REST API key. It is validated with a single keyword search call.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by Kakao (HTTP 401).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kakao API. Check your network and try again.

abort.already_configured: Kakao Map is already configured. Only one entry is supported.

search_place.name: Search place
search_place.description: Searches Kakao Map for a place by keyword and returns up to the top 5 results, each with coordinates, addresses, and map links.

query.name: Query
query.description: Search keyword, e.g. a place or business name.

search_nearby.name: Search nearby
search_nearby.description: Searches for places of a category or keyword around a center point, returning up to 5 results ordered by distance.

center.name: Center
center.description: The point to search around: an entity holding a location or a latitude/longitude value.

category.name: Category
category.description: A Kakao place category to search for. Provide either a category or a query, not both.

query.name: Query
query.description: A search keyword. Provide either a query or a category, not both.

geocode_address.name: Geocode address
geocode_address.description: Converts an address into WGS84 coordinates, returning the best match with its jibun/road address, postal code, and a map link.

query.name: Address
query.description: The address to geocode, e.g. a road-name or lot-number address.

get_directions.name: Get directions
get_directions.description: Builds a Kakao Map route link between an origin and destination (with optional waypoints) and returns the per-leg points. Travel time is added in a later step.

origin.name: Origin
origin.description: An entity holding the origin location (person, device_tracker, zone, sensor, ...) or a latitude/longitude value.

destination.name: Destination
destination.description: An entity holding the destination location or a latitude/longitude value.

waypoints.name: Waypoints
waypoints.description: Up to 5 stops, each an entity or a latitude/longitude value. Not allowed with the public transit mode.

mode.name: Travel mode
mode.description: car, traffic (public transit), walk, or bicycle.

api_error.message: The Kakao API request failed. Check the log for details.

point_input_missing.message: Specify an entity or coordinates for {role}.

invalid_location.message: Invalid location for {role}: {value}. Expected a latitude/longitude pair.

traffic_no_waypoints.message: Public transit routes do not support waypoints. Remove the waypoints or choose another mode.

too_many_waypoints.message: Too many waypoints ({count}). Kakao Map allows at most {max}.

nearby_input.message: Provide exactly one of category or query for the nearby search.
